def modify_features(df_input) -> pd.DataFrame:
    """ 
    Thought 1: The ratio of recency to total donation history may reveal consistency in donation behavior.
    New Feature 1: Donation_Recency_Ratio | Donation_Recency_Ratio = Recency / Time
    """
    df_output = df_input.copy()
    # Calculate recency of donations
    df_output['Donation_Recency_Ratio'] = df_output['Recency']/df_output['Time']
    
    return df_output
